releaseNotes: Major SQLite reliability release: safe restore with container lifecycle management, deep integrity checks via sqlite3 driver, cloud storage cleanup on backup deletion, and UX improvements.
changelog: Feature: Cloud Storage Deletion — backups are now auto-deleted from GDrive/OneDrive/S3 on local delete or rotation (#36)
Feature: SQLite sqlite3 prerequisite validation on Dashboard connection status
Fix (P0): Reworked SQLite restore — safe container stop, WAL/SHM neutralization, automatic restart
Fix: Resolved SQLite container stop error — no longer stops unrelated db_container for SQLite setups (#35)
Fix: Settings UI auto-clears db_container_name when db_type is sqlite
UX: Improved Telegram Chat ID hint to reference @userinfobot
Rewrite: Integrity checks now prove recoverability — SQLite via PRAGMA integrity_check + schema validation, Postgres via full decrypt/decompress pipeline
Docs: Updated screenshots, added community contributors, updated README.ua.md
